reviews.comment:
Nos sacó del agua con el combustible, que no se consigue

(Translated by Google)
He got us out of the water with fuel, which is unavailable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyeHIzbEtnEAE

reviews.comment:
Una estación de excelente, pero si van a Puerto Iguazú llenen el tanque antes de llegar, porque apenas llega el camión con combustible se agota, osea si venis de viaje que no te pase como a nosotros, de no conseguir y cuando logramos cargar, estuvimos 60 minutos haciendo cola.

(Translated by Google)
It's an excellent station, but if you're going to Puerto Iguazú, fill up your tank before you arrive, because as soon as the fuel truck arrives, it runs out. So if you're coming from a trip, don't let it happen to you like it did to us, not being able to find fuel and then having to wait in line for 60 minutes when we finally managed to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMycXRlWkVREAE

reviews.comment:
Poco orden descontrol de venta de combustibles colas larguísimas por la reventa de combustible como turista malisimo ya que te hacen perder horas y por consecuencia no poder recorer lugares

(Translated by Google)
Poor organization and uncontrolled fuel sales; extremely long queues due to fuel reselling. As a tourist, it's terrible because it makes you lose hours and consequently prevents you from visiting places.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyeXN1bDBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
En realidad aqui el problema es la falta de combustible en todas las estaciones de servicio...lamentable desconozco el motivo

(Translated by Google)
The real problem here is the lack of fuel at all the gas stations...it's unfortunate, I don't know why.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyZ3B6bjFnRRAB
